examples: Subsequently, they were purportedly given another sample of their preferred choice.
For a book purportedly about love, the Barthes didn't look very romantic.
Purportedly, either of the two constituent elements should prevail sooner or later.
Another document submitted to the court was purportedly sent to Greek police by a "Peter Rogers".
Some received bottles shaped like oil derricks, filled with black crude purportedly from "their" wells.
